start.welcome_new: Welcome, {name}! I'm your personal language tutor. First, what is your native language?
start.native_detected: Welcome, {name}! I'm your personal language tutor. I detected {language} as your native language from Telegram settings. Tap to confirm, or select a different one:
start.welcome_back: Welcome back, {name}! Just send me a message to start learning. Commands /words — Start a vocabulary review /stats — View your progress /settings — Manage preferences /end — End the current session /help — Get help
start.resume_timezone: Welcome back, {name}! Let's pick up where you left off. What's your timezone? This helps me send reminders at the right time.
start.ask_target_welcome: Hi, {name}! I'm your personal AI language tutor. Here's what makes me different: • Just talk to me — I create exercises from our conversation • I adapt to your level (A1→C2) and adjust difficulty automatically • I learn your interests and weave them into every exercise • Vocabulary flashcards with perfectly timed review reminders • Streaks, milestones, and weekly progress reports Let's get you set up — which language would you like to learn or strengthen?
start.resume_target: Welcome back, {name}! Let's pick up where you left off. Which language would you like to learn or strengthen?
start.ask_target: Great! Now, which language would you like to learn or strengthen?
start.ask_timezone:
Great choice! Now, what's your timezone?
This helps me send reminders at the right time.
start.cta_review: Starting vocabulary review! Use /words to begin.
start.cta_session: Ready to practice! Send me a message to start a session.
start.cta_session_prompt: Type anything to start — for example, "Let's practice" or "Teach me something new"
start.cta_continue_prompt: Let's continue where we left off
start.ask_level: How would you describe your current {target_language} level?
start.level_b1: Intermediate (B1) — I can hold a conversation
start.resume_level: Welcome back, {name}! Let's continue — what's your language level?
start.ask_goal: Almost there! Why are you learning {target_language}? Tap to select, then press Done.
start.goal_text_conversation: Everyday conversation — daily life, small talk, social situations
start.goal_text_writing: Writing & grammar — essays, letters, written expression
start.goal_text_work: Learn {target_language} for work and business communication
start.goal_text_hobby: Learn {target_language} as a hobby and explore the culture
start.skipped: Skipped — you can set this later in /settings
start.ask_interests: What topics interest you? Tap to select, then press Done.
start.ask_schedule: Last step! When would you like daily study reminders?
start.sched_desc_weekly: Weekly progress report on Sundays at {time}
start.onboarding_complete_sched: You're all set! I've set up daily reminders at {time} and a weekly report on Sundays. Starting your first lesson now — let's get to know each other!
start.onboarding_complete_nosched:
You're all set! Starting your first lesson now — let's get to know each other!

You can set up study reminders anytime in /settings.
start.first_session_error: Setup complete! I had a small hiccup starting your first lesson. Tap the button below to try again — or just send me any message!
start.first_session_prompt: Hi! I just finished setting up my profile. I'd love to tell you more about my goals and what I'm interested in — let's get started!
start.resume_goal: Welcome back, {name}! Let's continue — what's your learning goal?
start.resume_interests: Welcome back, {name}! Let's continue — what topics interest you?
start.resume_schedule: Welcome back, {name}! Almost done — when would you like reminders?
help.full: I'm your personal language tutor. Here's what I can do: Just send me a message to start a learning session. Commands /start — Restart initial setup /words — Review your vocabulary flashcards /stats — View your progress /settings — Manage preferences & reminders /end — End the current session /deleteme — Delete all your data /help — Show this help message How it works • Send me any message to start a conversation — I'll give you exercises, teach new words, and track your progress. • I adapt exercises to your level and interests automatically. • Your level adjusts automatically as you improve — just keep practicing! • Each conversation has a message limit — I'll let you know when it's close. • Use /end to finish, or it closes automatically after a few minutes of inactivity. • Tell me your goals (e.g. "I want to prepare for a trip") and I'll tailor exercises to match. Tips • Use /words regularly to strengthen your memory with flashcard reviews. • Check /settings to customize difficulty, style, and notifications.
help.new_user:
Welcome! I'm your personal AI language tutor.

To get started, complete the setup with /start — it only takes a minute!

Here's what I can do:
• Chat with you naturally and create exercises from our conversation
• Adapt to your level, interests, and goals automatically
• Track vocabulary with smart flashcard reviews
• Adjust difficulty based on your performance

Once you're set up, just send me any message to start learning!
help.getting_started: You're all set up! Here's how to start: • Send me any message to begin your first lesson • I'll adapt to your level and interests • Try saying something like "Let's practice" or "Teach me some basics" Useful commands /words — Review vocabulary flashcards /stats — View your progress /settings — Manage preferences /help — Show this help
help.returning: Welcome back! Here's a quick refresher: • Send me any message to start a session • I'll help you warm up and review what you've learned • Use /words to catch up on vocabulary flashcards Commands /words — Vocabulary flashcard review /stats — View your progress /settings — Manage preferences & reminders /end — End the current session /help — Show this help
chat.no_session: No active session. Use /start to begin setup.
chat.no_active_session: You don't have an active session right now.
chat.session_ended:
Session ended. Your progress has been saved.
Send a message anytime to start a new session!
chat.setup_first: Please complete the setup first! Use /start to begin.
chat.error: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
chat.text_only: I can only work with text messages for now. Please type your response instead.
settings.title: Settings
settings.notif_types_title: Notification types Tap to enable or disable each type:
settings.current_level: Current level: {level} Select your new level:
settings.quiet_hours_current: Current quiet hours: {value} During quiet hours, no notifications will be sent. Select a preset:
settings.max_notif_current: Current limit: {count} per day How many notifications per day?
settings.max_notif_set: Max notifications set to {count} per day.
settings.no_schedules: You have no schedules. Tell me in chat to create one: "Set a daily reminder at 8am"
settings.schedule_confirm_delete: Delete schedule {desc}? This action cannot be undone.
settings.schedule_auto_paused: Your schedule {desc} was automatically paused due to repeated delivery issues. You can resume it in /settings → View schedules.
settings.current_target_lang: Current target language: {target_language} Select a new target language. Warning: This will reset your progress (vocabulary, scores, level, streak).
settings.lang_switch_confirm: Switch to {target_language}? This will permanently delete: • {vocab_count} vocabulary cards • {exercise_count} exercise results • Your level {level} (reset to A1) • Your {streak}-day streak and all scores • Your learning goals Schedules and preferences (difficulty, style) will be kept. Are you sure?
settings.lang_switched: Target language switched to {target_language}. Your level has been reset to A1. Send me a message to start learning!
settings.level_changed: Level changed from {old_level} to {new_level}. The tutor will adapt exercises to your new level.
settings.session_refreshed: Your active session was ended to apply the new setting. Your progress is saved — send a message to start a new session.
settings.active_session: You have an active session. Use /end to finish it first, then change settings.
settings.cancelled: Cancelled. Use /settings to manage your preferences.
settings.debug_log_enabled: Debug logging enabled. Log level set to DEBUG.
settings.debug_log_disabled: Debug logging disabled. Log level set to INFO.
settings.msg_outdated: This message is outdated. Please use /settings again.
deleteme.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently remove: • Your profile and preferences • All vocabulary and review history • All exercise results • All schedules and notifications • All session history This action cannot be undone.
deleteme.done:
All your data has been deleted.
Send /start if you ever want to come back!
deleteme.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
review.active_session: You have an active session right now. Use /end to finish it first, then try /words again.
review.no_cards_empty:
You don't have any vocabulary cards yet.
Send me a message to start a learning session — new words will be added to your review deck automatically!
review.no_cards_due:
No vocabulary cards are due for review right now.
You have {total} words in your deck. Cards will appear here when it's time to review them.
review.card_recall_hint: Try to recall the meaning, then tap below.
review.card_rating_hint: How well did you remember? Again = forgot, Easy = instant recall. This affects when you'll see this card next.
review.text_during_review: You're reviewing flashcards right now — use the buttons above to rate each card. Send /words to restart or just keep going!
review.ended_early:
Review ended. Your progress has been saved.
Use /words to review more cards anytime!
review.more_due: You still have {count} more cards due for review.
stats.title: Your Progress ({target_language})
stats.no_goals: No learning goals set. Tell me your goals in chat!
rate_limit.message: You're sending messages too fast ({limit} per minute). Please wait about a minute before trying again.
session.daily_limit: You've used {used}/{max_sessions} sessions today ({tier} plan). The limit resets at midnight your time. In the meantime, you can use /words to practice your vocabulary!
session.cost_limit: You've reached today's session limit. It resets at midnight your time. You can still use /words to practice vocabulary!
session.verify_error: Couldn't verify your session limit. Please try again in a moment.
session.cost_verify_error: Couldn't verify your session limit. Please try again in a moment.
session.busy: The bot is experiencing high demand right now. Please try again in 1-2 minutes.
session.error_retry: Something went wrong. Please send your message again to start a new session — your progress is saved.
session.no_response: I'm sorry, I couldn't generate a response. Please try again.
session.turn_limit_warn: Our lessons are limited in length, so let's start wrapping up this one. Your progress is saved — you can always start a new lesson anytime if you haven't reached your daily limit.
session.cost_warn: This conversation is nearing its resource limit and will wrap up soon — your progress is saved automatically.
session.idle_warn: Your session will close in about {minutes} minute(s) due to inactivity. Send a message to keep it alive, or use /end to close it.
session.summary_header: Your session has ended. Here's a quick summary:
session.summary_no_progress: - No exercises this time — try /words to practice vocabulary, or send a message to start learning!
session.summary_footer: Send a message to start a new session!
pipeline.milestone_sessions: {count} sessions and counting! Keep it up!
pipeline.difficulty_adjusted: Your difficulty has been adjusted from {old} to {new} based on your recent scores!
pipeline.level_changed: Student manually changed their level from {old_level} to {new_level} via Settings. Acknowledge this and adapt exercises to the new level.
notif.streak_risk: You're on a {streak}-day streak! A quick 2-minute review will keep it going.
{name}, {streak} days of progress — keep the momentum with a quick review!
Hey {name}, even a quick 5-minute session will keep your {streak}-day streak alive!
notif.cards_due: You have {due_count} vocabulary cards ready for review. A quick session will keep them fresh!
{name}, {due_count} words are waiting for review. Ready for a quick round?
Time to strengthen your memory! {due_count} cards are due for review.
notif.user_inactive: Hey {name}! Ready to jump back in? Even 5 minutes makes a difference.
{name}, it's been a bit — a quick session is a great way to get back on track!
Your {target_language} skills could use a quick refresher. Ready when you are!
notif.weak_area_persistent: {name}, you've been working on {topic} for a few sessions. Let's try a focused exercise!
Ready to tackle {topic} again? Practice makes perfect!
notif.score_trend_improving: Your scores are improving! Keep up the great work, {name}!
You're on a roll! Your recent scores show real progress.
notif.score_trend_declining: Let's try some review exercises to get back on track, {name}.
Don't worry about the recent scores — a quick review session will help!
notif.incomplete_exercise: You didn't finish your {topic} exercise. Pick up where you stopped?
Ready to finish your {topic} exercise? You were doing great!
notif.milestone_vocab: You've hit {count} words of vocabulary! That's a huge milestone, {name}!
Wow, {count} words! Your vocabulary is growing impressively!
notif.milestone_streak: Amazing! {streak} days in a row! Keep the momentum going!
{streak}-day streak! You're building an incredible habit, {name}!
notif.daily_review: Hey {name}! You have {due_count} vocabulary cards ready for review.
{name}, time for your daily review! {due_count} cards are waiting.
Good time for a review, {name}! {due_count} cards are ready — consistency is key.
notif.progress_report: Weekly Summary Level: {level} Streak: {streak} days Words learned: {vocab_count} Sessions this week: {sessions_week} Keep it up, {name}!
notif.weekly_summary_template: Weekly Summary Level: {level} Streak: {streak} days Words learned: {vocab_count} Sessions this week: {sessions_week} Keep it up, {name}!
notif.weak_area_drill: {name}, it's been a while since you practiced {topic}. Ready for a focused drill?
Time to sharpen your {topic} skills! A quick targeted exercise can make a big difference.
Your {topic} could use some practice. Let's do a focused drill!
notif.difficulty_changed: Your difficulty has been adjusted to {new_difficulty} based on your recent performance!
Nice progress! Your difficulty level is now {new_difficulty}.
notif.post_onboarding_24h: {name}, you're all set up! Ready for your first {target_language} lesson? Just send a message to get started.
Welcome aboard, {name}! Your {target_language} journey awaits — send any message to start your first lesson.
Hey {name}, your setup is complete! Type anything to begin your first {target_language} session.
notif.post_onboarding_3d: {name}, your {target_language} tutor is ready whenever you are. Even 5 minutes makes a difference!
Still thinking about learning {target_language}, {name}? Your personalized tutor is waiting — just say hi!
A quick 5-minute session is all it takes to get started, {name}. Ready to try {target_language}?
notif.post_onboarding_7d: {name}, we're still here for you! Your {target_language} learning plan is ready when you are.
It's never too late to start, {name}. Your personalized {target_language} lessons are ready to go!
notif.lapsed_gentle: {name}, it's been a couple of days! A quick session will keep your {target_language} fresh.
Miss you, {name}! Ready for a quick {target_language} warm-up?
Hey {name}, even a short session keeps the momentum going. Ready to jump back in?
notif.lapsed_compelling: {name}, you've already learned {vocabulary_count} words and reached level {level}! Your foundation is still strong — a quick session will refresh it.
Your {target_language} skills miss you, {name}! You've built a solid foundation with {sessions_completed} sessions — let's keep building.
{name}, you've come so far with your {target_language}! A quick warm-up session will get you right back on track.
notif.lapsed_miss_you: {name}, your {target_language} journey doesn't have to end here. Come back and we'll start with a gentle review.
Your notes and vocabulary are saved, {name}! {vocabulary_count} words in your collection. Ready for a warm-up to refresh them?
notif.post_onboarding_14d: We haven't forgotten about you, {name}! Your {target_language} learning journey is still waiting. Just send a message to get started.
{name}, it's been a couple of weeks since you set up. Your personalized {target_language} tutor is ready whenever you are!
notif.dormant_weekly: {name}, your {target_language} skills are waiting for you! Even a quick 5-minute session helps keep things fresh.
Still thinking about learning {target_language}, {name}? Your progress is saved and your tutor is ready to pick up where you left off.
notif.progress_celebration: You're doing great, {name}! Averaging {avg_score}/10 on recent exercises. Keep it up!
Impressive, {name}! Your vocabulary has grown to {vocab_count} words. That's real dedication!
{name}, {sessions_completed} sessions completed! You're building a solid foundation.
Keep it going, {name}! Your {streak}-day streak shows real commitment.
pipeline.plan_completed: You've completed your learning plan targeting {target_level}! Time to create a new plan for the next level.
whitelist.request_sent: Your access request has been sent to the administrator. You'll be notified when it's approved.
whitelist.already_requested: You already have a pending access request. Please wait for the administrator to review it.
whitelist.approved: Your access has been approved! Send /start to begin your language learning journey.
whitelist.rejected: Your access request was not approved. Contact the administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
